creator: rewdale@giasbg01.vsnl.net.in
text:
I'am presently running FreeBSD 2.1 on a Pentium 90 and it is
running fine. I have a SONY CDU76E IDE/ATAPI cdrom , the driver
provided by you works fine except, it has problems obtaining
CAP_PAGE at the startup, it obtains CAP_PAGE if the DRIVE is
initialized by dos based drivers.
